skills.name: suggest-dinner
skills.description: Suggest 3 dinner recipes to cook tonight using pantry items, respecting allergies and dislikes. Supports craving filters like 'Chicken' or 'something spicy'.

skills.name: generate-plan
skills.description: Generate a personalized 7-night dinner plan with alternatives, using the household's pantry, preferences, allergies, and past meal feedback.

skills.name: manage-pantry
skills.description: Add, update, or remove items in the household's pantry. Supports bulk natural-language input like '2 lbs chicken, milk, 3 onions'.
